# AtlasDays

> AtlasDays is a private iPhone app and website for tracking visa limits, residency or tax presence days, and travel history.

AtlasDays is a record-keeping and day-counting tool, not legal or tax advice. Official government guidance and professional advice remain authoritative for rule interpretation.

## Start Here

- [AtlasDays — Private Day Tracking for Visa, Residency, and Travel History](https://atlasdays.app/): AtlasDays is a private iPhone app for tracking visa limits, residency or tax presence days, and accurate travel history. On-device, no account required.

## Help

- [Help Center — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/help/): Use the AtlasDays Help Center for setup, Photo, CSV, and Flighty import, US state tracking, trip records, trackers, widgets, exports, privacy, and iCloud sync.
- [Getting Started — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/getting-started): Avoid early AtlasDays setup mistakes: choose Home Country or No fixed residence correctly, enter trips that affect live counts first, and know when trackers or import should wait.
- [Trackers and Limits — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/trackers-and-limits): Troubleshoot AtlasDays trackers: check country or US state scope, time window, trip precision, Smart Alerts, and when a tracker result is safe to trust.
- [Dashboard and Map — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/dashboard-and-map): Troubleshoot AtlasDays dashboard totals and map output: selected period, Days Abroad, US states, Transit, ongoing trips, and when the record needs fixing.
- [Trip Modes and Record Quality — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/history-and-import): Troubleshoot messy trip history in AtlasDays: choose Exact Dates, Year, Unknown, Transit, and ongoing correctly, and review Photo, CSV, or Flighty import before trusting counts.
- [Timeline and Calendar — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/timeline-and-calendar): Use the AtlasDays Timeline in List or Calendar mode, find trips and photos, review Auto-Detect suggestions, display US state stays, and resolve overlaps.
- [Photo Import — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/photo-import): Use AtlasDays Photo Import to scan geotagged photo metadata on device, review inferred trips and US states, handle duplicates and overlaps, and understand privacy.
- [CSV Import — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/csv-import): Troubleshoot AtlasDays CSV import: row errors, US State rows, skipped duplicates, overlap warnings, date models, preview review, and when imported data is safe enough to trust.
- [Flighty Import — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/flighty-import): Import your flight history from a Flighty CSV export into AtlasDays. How trips are built from flights, including US state detection, transit, overnights, and overlaps.
- [AtlasDays Pro: Free vs Pro — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/atlasdays-pro): AtlasDays is free to use, with an optional Pro upgrade. See exactly what's free, what AtlasDays Pro unlocks — unlimited trackers, Smart Alerts, exports, US states, and widgets — and how the upgrade works.
- [Export and Reports — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/export-and-reports): Troubleshoot CSV export and PDF export in AtlasDays: check AtlasDays Pro, selected period, US State columns, missing trips, and what export cannot fix.
- [Privacy, Location, and Sync — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/privacy-location-and-sync): Troubleshoot Auto-Detect Trips, US state detection, Photos access, Flighty or CSV import, notification permission, and iCloud sync expectations.
- [iCloud Sync and Restore — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/icloud-sync-and-restore): Troubleshoot AtlasDays iCloud sync, new-device and reinstall expectations, what syncs, what does not, and when export is the safer backup path.
- [Home Screen Widgets — AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/widgets): Add AtlasDays trackers and a world map to your iPhone Home Screen. Choose widget sizes, show tracker forecasts, and understand US state widget limits.

## Learn

- [Travel Rules and Guides by Place or Topic — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/): Search AtlasDays travel rules and guides, browse rules by country or US state, or read general articles about day counting and travel records.
- [Turn Your Flighty Flight History Into a Visa Day Count — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/flighty-flight-history-day-count): Flighty tracks your flights, not your days in each country. Here's how to turn your Flighty flight history into a visa and residency day count you can trust.
- [What Does 90 Days in Any 180-Day Period Mean? — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/schengen-90-180-rule): The Schengen 90-day rule in Europe means up to 90 total days in the Schengen area within any rolling 180-day period. Plain-English explanation and examples.
- [Japan's 90-Day Rule Explained — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/japan-90-day-rule): What people usually mean by Japan's 90-day rule, how Japan differs from Schengen-style rolling windows, and why repeated entries are not the same as a clean annual allowance.
- [Schengen Countries List for the 90/180 Rule — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/schengen-countries-list-90-180-rule): Which countries count together under the Schengen 90/180 short-stay rule, and why EU membership is not the same thing as Schengen membership.
- [When Do You Get Schengen Days Back After a 90-Day Stay? — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/when-do-you-get-schengen-days-back-after-90-day-stay): When Schengen days come back after a long stay, why they return one by one, and why there is no lump-sum reset.
- [183-Day Tax Residency Rule: What Travelers Need to Know — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/183-day-tax-residency-rule): What people usually mean by the 183-day tax residency rule, why it is common but not universal, and where day counting stops being the whole answer.
- [UK Statutory Residence Test: What Travelers Need to Know - AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uk-statutory-residence-test): What the UK Statutory Residence Test is trying to determine, why it is not a simple 183-day rule, and how automatic tests, sufficient ties, and prior residence change the analysis.
- [US Substantial Presence Test: What Travelers Need to Know — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/us-substantial-presence-test): What the U.S. substantial presence test is trying to determine, why it is not a simple 183-day rule, and where exceptions, treaties, and professional advice matter.
- [How to Track Your Travel Days (And Why Spreadsheets Fail) — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/how-to-track-travel-days): What tracking travel days is actually trying to achieve, why spreadsheets and memory fail faster than people expect, and what makes a travel record usable over time.
- [US B1/B2 Visa: Understanding the 180-Day Stay Limit — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/us-b1-b2-visa-180-day-limit): What people usually mean by the U.S. B1/B2 180-day stay shorthand, why it is incomplete, and how visa validity, admission, and authorized stay fit together.
- [What Counts as a 'Day' for Visa Purposes? — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/what-counts-as-a-day-for-visa-purposes): What people usually mean when they ask what counts as a day, why the answer is not universal, and where entry, exit, transit, and regime differences start to matter.
- [Digital Nomad Visa Day Limits: A Country-by-Country Overview — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/digital-nomad-visa-day-limits): A practical overview of how common nomad destinations frame short stays, extensions, and longer remote-work routes, without pretending one summary can replace official programme rules.
- [How the Schengen Rolling Window Actually Works — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/schengen-rolling-window-walkthrough): A practical walkthrough of how the Schengen 90/180 rolling window works, why days return one by one, and where manual counting goes wrong.
- [UK Standard Visitor: How Length of Stay Is Assessed — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uk-standard-visitor-visa-180-day-rule): What people usually mean by the UK Standard Visitor 180-day shorthand, why it is incomplete, and how visit length, travel pattern, and genuine visitor assessment fit together.
- [UK ETA vs Standard Visitor Visa: What's the Difference? — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uk-eta-vs-standard-visitor-visa): How the UK ETA and Standard Visitor visa differ, when the distinction matters, and why neither one should be treated as guaranteed entry by itself.
- [How to Prepare Travel History for a Visa Application — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/travel-history-for-visa-applications): What a travel-history record for a visa application usually needs to do, what makes it usable or weak, and where official application instructions take priority.
- [Travel History Template for Visa Applications — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/travel-history-template-visa-application): What a travel-history template is for, why no single template works everywhere, what fields to include, and what to verify before relying on one in a formal submission.
- [How to Rebuild Your Travel History From Passport Stamps, Emails, and Photos — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/rebuild-travel-history-from-passport-stamps-emails-photos): What rebuilding travel history actually involves, which sources are strongest, how to handle gaps and conflicts honestly, and what makes a reconstructed timeline defensible.
- [How to Prove Time Spent in a Country When You Don't Have Perfect Records — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/prove-time-spent-in-country-without-perfect-records): What proving time spent in a country is actually trying to do, how stronger and weaker evidence work together, and how to build a defensible chronology when records are incomplete.
- [How to Prove You Were Not in a Country - AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/prove-you-were-not-in-a-country): What proving absence is actually trying to establish, which records can support it, and why a consistent chronology matters more than any one document.
- [How to Export Your Travel History for a Visa Application — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/export-travel-history-visa-application): What an exported travel-history record is trying to achieve, when it helps, what makes it weak, and what to verify before relying on it for a visa application.
- [How Many Countries Are There in the World? — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/how-many-countries-in-the-world): Why 195 is the usual answer, why travelers still encounter other numbers, and where a simple country count stops being a simple question.
- [Does a Layover Count as Visiting a Country? — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/does-a-layover-count-as-visiting-a-country): How to think about layovers for immigration, day counting, and personal travel lists without pretending those questions all have the same answer.
- [Country Counting Rules: Every Major List Compared — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/country-counting-rules-every-list-compared): How major country-counting systems differ, what they are actually trying to count, and why travel totals stop being comparable when the list is unclear.
- [UK ILR Absence Limits: What Continuous Residence Is Trying to Show - AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uk-ilr-absence-limit): What UK ILR absence limits are trying to measure, why many routes use a 180-days-in-any-12-months style test, and why route, qualifying period, and rule version matter.
- [Overstaying a Visa or Stay Limit: What It Means and Why It Matters — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/overstaying-a-visa-or-stay-limit): What overstaying a visa or stay limit means, why consequences differ across immigration systems, and the key misunderstandings that put travelers at risk.
- [UK Citizenship Absence Limits: What Naturalisation Residence Rules Are Trying to Show - AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uk-citizenship-absence-limits): What UK citizenship absence limits are trying to assess, how the 5-year and 3-year naturalisation residence tests are usually framed, and why timing, status history, and discretion matter.
- [Tax Residency by Country: 183-Day Rules Compared – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/tax-residency-by-country): Browse tax residency day-count rules by country. Find the day threshold, counting window, and how to calculate residency for each country, with the official government source.
- [Portugal 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/portugal-183-day-tax-residency): Portugal's 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: more than 183 days in any rolling 12-month period makes you a tax resident. How to count it, plus the habitual-residence test and the official source.
- [Thailand 180-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/thailand-180-day-tax-residency): Thailand's tax residency rule in plain terms: more than 180 days in a calendar year makes you a Thai tax resident. How to count it, what it means for foreign income, and the official source.
- [Australia's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/australia-183-day-tax-residency): Australia's 183-day test in plain terms: 183 or more days in an income year presumes you are a resident for tax, unless your usual place of abode is outside Australia. How to count it and the official ATO source.
- [Canada's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/canada-183-day-tax-residency): Canada's 183-day rule in plain terms: sojourn 183 days or more in a calendar year and you are a deemed resident taxed on worldwide income. Plus the residential-ties test, how to count, and the official CRA source.
- [Colombia 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/colombia-183-day-tax-residency): Colombia's 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: more than 183 days in any rolling 365-day period makes you a tax resident. How to count it, what happens when days straddle two years, and the official source.
- [Estonia 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/estonia-183-day-tax-residency): Estonia's 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: 183 days or more in any 12 consecutive calendar months makes you a tax resident. How to count it, plus the permanent-home test and the official source.
- [Georgia (Country) 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/georgia-183-day-tax-residency): Georgia's (the country) 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: 183 or more days in any continuous 12-month period ending in the tax year makes you a tax resident. How to count it, plus the official source.
- [Greece 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/greece-183-day-tax-residency): Greece's 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: more than 183 days in any 12-month period makes you a tax resident from your first day. How to count it, the centre of vital interests test, and the official source.
- [Ireland's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/ireland-183-day-tax-residency): Ireland's tax residency rule in plain terms: 183 days or more in a tax year makes you resident, and a 280-day two-year test can too. How to count it and the official source.
- [Malta 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/malta-183-day-tax-residency): Malta's tax residency rule in plain terms: more than 183 days in a calendar year makes you a Maltese tax resident. How to count it, what domicile and the remittance basis change, and the official source.
- [Mauritius 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/mauritius-183-day-tax-residency): Mauritius's tax residency rule in plain terms: 183 days or more in an income year makes you a Mauritian tax resident, and a separate 270-day test looks across three years. How to count both, and the official source.
- [New Zealand 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/new-zealand-183-day-tax-residency): New Zealand's 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: more than 183 days in any 12-month period makes you a tax resident, backdated to the first of those days. How to count it, plus the permanent-place-of-abode test and the official source.
- [Romania 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/romania-183-day-tax-residency): Romania's 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: more than 183 days in any 12 consecutive months ending in the calendar year makes you a tax resident. How to count it, plus the domicile and centre of vital interests tests and the official source.
- [Singapore 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/singapore-183-day-tax-residency): Singapore's tax residency rule in plain terms: 183 days or more of presence or employment in a calendar year makes you a Singapore tax resident. How to count it, the concessions, and the official source.
- [UAE 183-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uae-183-day-tax-residency): The UAE's 183-day tax residency rule in plain terms: 183 days or more in any consecutive 12-month period makes you a UAE tax resident. How to count it, the 90-day test, and the official source.
- [US State Tax Residency: 183-Day Rules by State – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/us-state-tax-residency): Browse US state tax residency rules. Find the day threshold and statutory-residence basis for each state, and how to calculate residency, with the official state source.
- [Arizona's 9-Month Residency Presumption Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/arizona-tax-residency): Arizona's residency rule in plain terms: spending more than nine months (about 270 days) of the tax year in Arizona presumes you are a resident, unless you rebut it. How to count it, and the official source.
- [California Tax Residency and the Nine-Month Presumption Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/california-tax-residency): California has no fixed day-count line for residency. It is a closest-connections test, but spending more than nine months (about 270 days) in California in a tax year creates a rebuttable presumption of residency. How the count works, and the official source.
- [Colorado's Six-Month (183-Day) Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/colorado-tax-residency): Colorado's six-month rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than six months (more than 183 days) in Colorado in the tax year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Connecticut's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/connecticut-tax-residency): Connecticut's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 183 days in Connecticut in a taxable year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Georgia's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule (the US State) Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/georgia-us-tax-residency): Georgia the US state taxes you as a resident if you spend 183 days or more in Georgia during any 12 consecutive months, not just a calendar year. How the rolling day count works, and the official source.
- [Hawaii's 200-Day Tax Residency Presumption Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/hawaii-tax-residency): Hawaii's 200-day rule in plain terms: spending more than 200 days in Hawaii in the tax year creates a rebuttable presumption of residency. How the presumption works, how to rebut it, and the official source.
- [Idaho's 270-Day Tax Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/idaho-tax-residency): Idaho's 270-day rule in plain terms: keep a home in Idaho and spend more than 270 days there in the tax year and you are a resident, even if domiciled elsewhere. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Maine's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/maine-tax-residency): Maine's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 183 days in Maine in a tax year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, the safe harbors, and the official source.
- [Maryland's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/maryland-tax-residency): Maryland's 183-day rule in plain terms: a place of abode kept for more than six months plus 183 or more days in Maryland in a calendar year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Massachusetts's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/massachusetts-tax-residency): Massachusetts's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 183 days in Massachusetts in the taxable year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Minnesota's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/minnesota-tax-residency): Minnesota's 183-day rule in plain terms: an abode in Minnesota plus at least 183 days in the state during the year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Nebraska's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/nebraska-tax-residency): Nebraska's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus 183 days or more in Nebraska in a calendar year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [New Jersey's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/new-jersey-tax-residency): New Jersey's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent home in New Jersey plus more than 183 days in the state in a calendar year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [New York's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/new-york-tax-residency): New York's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 183 days in New York in a calendar year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [North Dakota's 7-Month (210-Day) Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/north-dakota-tax-residency): North Dakota's 7-month rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 210 days in North Dakota in a tax year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Ohio's 212 Contact-Period Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/ohio-tax-residency): Ohio counts contact periods (overnights), not days. More than 212 contact periods in a calendar year makes you a presumed Ohio resident under Rev. Code §5747.24. How contact periods work, and the official source.
- [Oregon's 200-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/oregon-tax-residency): Oregon's 200-day rule in plain terms: maintaining a place of abode in Oregon plus more than 200 days in the state during the tax year makes you a resident, unless the stay is temporary. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Pennsylvania's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/pennsylvania-tax-residency): Pennsylvania's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 183 days in Pennsylvania in a calendar year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Rhode Island's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/rhode-island-tax-residency): Rhode Island's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 183 days in Rhode Island in a calendar year makes you a resident, even if domiciled elsewhere. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Vermont's 183-Day Statutory Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/vermont-tax-residency): Vermont's 183-day rule in plain terms: a permanent place of abode plus more than 183 days in Vermont in the taxable year makes you a statutory resident. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Virginia's 183-Day Actual Residency Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/virginia-tax-residency): Virginia's 183-day rule in plain terms: maintaining a place of abode in Virginia for more than 183 days in the taxable year makes you an actual resident, even if domiciled elsewhere. How to count it, and the official source.
- [Day-Count Rule Directory: Visa and Residency Limits – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/day-limits): Browse visa, entry, and tax-residency day-count rules by country, US state, and shared travel regime, with counting methods and official sources.
- [US Visa Waiver Program 90-Day Limit Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/us-visa-waiver-90-day-limit): The US Visa Waiver Program in plain terms: with an approved ESTA you may be admitted for up to 90 days per visit. How the limit works, why nearby-country trips don't reset it, and the official source.
- [Turkiye's 90/180 Rule Explained – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/turkiye-90-180-rule): Turkiye's 90/180 short-stay rule in plain terms: at most 90 days within any rolling 180-day period on a visa or visa exemption. How the rolling window is counted, with a worked example and the official source.
- [Schengen Single-Entry Visa: Entries vs Duration of Stay – AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/learn/schengen-single-entry-visa): What a Schengen single-entry visa means: how to read the number of entries, the duration of stay, and the validity dates on a uniform (type C) visa. Once you leave, a single-entry visa is used up.

## Site Information

- [About — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/about): AtlasDays is built by one person who needed it to work. The story behind a private day-tracking app for visa limits, residency thresholds, and travel history.
- [Terms of Use — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/terms): Terms of Use for the AtlasDays app and related website pages, including app license, paid features, subscriptions, privacy, and support.
- [App Privacy — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/privacy): How the AtlasDays app handles local data, Apple iCloud sync, Photos import, country-detection suggestions, notifications, and CSV/PDF import/export.
- [Changelog — AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/changelog): Public release notes for AtlasDays, the private travel-history app for iPhone.
